User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the VamO system, can be a passenger, driver, admin, or municipal admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: The user's role: passenger, driver, admin, or admin_municipal.

city.description: The city where the user is primarily located.

country.description: The country code of the user (e.g., 'AR').

nonWithdrawableBalance.description: The portion of the balance that is promotional and cannot be withdrawn (e.g., welcome bonus).

vehicleType.description: For drivers, the type of vehicle: taxi or remis.

vehicleModel.description: The model of the driver's vehicle (e.g., 'Toyota Etios').

vehicleColor.description: The color of the driver's vehicle.

plateNumber.description: The license plate number of the driver's vehicle.

licenseVerified.description: Indicates if the driver's license has been verified by an admin.

servicesOffered.description: Specifies which services a driver has opted into.

rewardPoints.description: Gamification points earned by the driver.

stats.description: Performance and activity metrics for the user.

documentation.description: Contains the status and expiration of all driver-related documents.

driverStatus.description: The driver's current operational status (denormalized for UI).

municipalStatus.description: The driver's official status as per the municipality.

disinfectionExpiresAt.description: Expiration date of the last disinfection certificate.

isTripInsured.description: Indicates if the driver has trip-based insurance active.

fcmToken.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications.

DriverLocation.title: Driver Location
DriverLocation.description: Stores the real-time location and operational status of a driver for fast querying.

Ride.title: Ride
Ride.description: Represents a ride request and its details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ride entity.

origin.description: The starting location of the ride.

status.description: The current status of the ride (e.g., requested, searching, en route, active, paused, completed).

fare.description: The calculated fare for the ride.

serviceType.description: The type of ride service selected (Premium, Express).

startTime.description: The date and time when the ride started.

endTime.description: The date and time when the ride ended.

matchingStartedAt.description: Timestamp when the matching engine started searching for drivers.

matchingExpiresAt.description: Timestamp when the ride request expires if no driver is found.

notifiedDrivers.description: List of driver IDs that have been notified for this ride to avoid duplicates.

requestRadius.description: The radius in meters for the driver search.

city.description: The city where the ride was requested.

matchingVersion.description: Version of the matching algorithm used for this ride.

pricingVersion.description: Version of the pricing algorithm used for fare estimation.

DriverDocument.title: Driver Document
DriverDocument.description: Represents a single piece of documentation for a driver.

status.description: The current status of the document.

expiresAt.description: The expiration date of the document.

fileUrl.description: URL to the stored document file (e.g., in Firebase Storage).

RideOffer.title: Ride Offer
RideOffer.description: Represents an offer sent to a specific driver for a specific ride.

finalizedAt.description: Timestamp when the offer was finalized (accepted, rejected, expired, etc.).

distanceMeters.description: Distance in meters from the driver to the pickup point at the time of the offer.

round.description: The matching round this offer was sent in (1, 2, 3...).

WithdrawalRequest.title: Withdrawal Request
WithdrawalRequest.description: Represents a driver's request to withdraw funds from their wallet.

processedBy.description: Admin UID who processed the request.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Each document is uniquely identified by the user's ID. This now includes detailed driver documentation and municipal status.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Optimized collection for fast, real-time geo-queries of available drivers.

params.name: driverId
params.description: The unique identifier for the driver.

definition.description: Stores ride details. This collection is central to the application's operation.

params.name: rideId
params.description: The unique identifier for the ride.

definition.description: Stores individual ride offers sent to drivers to avoid race conditions and manage the matching lifecycle.

params.name: offerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the ride offer.

definition.description: Stores driver withdrawal requests for admin processing.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique identifier for the withdrawal request.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the VamO application's features, including ride requests, fare calculations, user role management, and real-time updates. The structure prioritizes authorization independence and simplifies security rules.  

Authorization Independence: For the Rides subcollection under each user (both passengers and drivers), relevant user information (roles) can be denormalized into the ride documents. This avoids the need for `get()` calls in security rules to verify user roles, thus enabling atomic operations.

QAPs (Query Approval Policies): The structure ensures secure `list` operations by segregating data based on user roles and relationships (e.g., rides owned by passengers are stored under their respective user documents). This segregation, combined with path-based rules, enables secure listing of resources.

Data Clarity and Predictability:  Explicit state modeling is used with the `status` field in the `Ride` entity to represent the ride's state clearly (e.g., 'requested', 'searching', 'en route', 'active', 'paused', 'completed').
